title: 毎日王冠の後に・運命,彼方に集いて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (As I thought, they really are amazing!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I was so overwhelmed by the pressure emanating
from Oguri and the others that I couldn't perform
as well as I'd hoped to!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Are you entering the autumn Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I intend to, yes. And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall defeat you there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Glad to hear it. Bring it on, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What's the big idea, keeping me out of the loop?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Inari...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
For the record, I'm also runnin' the autumn Tenno
Sho. Creek, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(That means the Eternal Top Three will all be
there!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I like that fire in your eyes! You know,
you're actually pretty easy to read.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Better buckle up though. You're in for the ride of
a lifetime. I'll be seeing you, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It appears as though luck is on our side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Eternal Top Three will all be present. I
couldn't have wished for a finer opportunity.
choice_data_list: Looks like we'd better refine our strategy.
Looks like we'd better refine our strategy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Let's devote all the energy we possess to the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And then... claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
History, and this very moment... Who will they
smile upon? The hour in which we'll find out is
rapidly approaching...
